calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Petitioner: Ly T. Duong, present in pro per for self and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Andie Duong, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of an Adult to: Kimberly D. Lum, and Change of Name of the Minor to: Amy Lum.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-26-2006 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-09-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name for an Adult and of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Jeffrey C. Tsu, Esq. for Petitioner: Ly T. Duong, also present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Andie Duong.
Matter is taken off-calendar at Counsel's request in open court.
